summary: Adjusted the chapter opening to avoid repeating chapter 2's temporal-entry scaffold and sharpened the closing handoff so Mina's overnight decision flows directly into the next chapter's paperwork scene.
edits: Reframed the opening around a water-first spatial anchor instead of a 'By the time' arrival construction while preserving the same arrival information and tone.
Added a brief paperwork cue to the final line so the chapter exits cleanly into Mina's next-morning permit attempt.
Verified that no calibration-only example lines from the style bible appear verbatim in the chapter.
